encounters.description: While walking through the grounds, a small creature, a Pseudodragon, lands on your shoulder and nuzzles up to you. It looks like it needs something.

choices.effect: You manage to calm the Pseudodragon, and it seems to trust you. Tasha smiles and thanks you.
You realize the Pseudodragon is trying to lead you somewhere—follow it.
You leave the Pseudodragon alone, and it flies off disappointed.

encounters.description: You and your friends have a small scuffle with a few mischievous *Gremlins* who seem to be causing havoc around the student dorms. They are making loud noises and hiding things.

choices.effect: You manage to scare the Gremlins off, and they scatter. Ziraj laughs and admires your bravery.
You find where the Gremlins are hiding their stolen objects and manage to return everything.
You simply walk away, letting the Gremlins continue their chaos. Ziraj seems unimpressed.

encounters.description: A group of students accidentally summon a small *Imp* during a practical magic lesson. It seems a bit too mischievous for their liking.

choices.effect: You identify the summoning error and quickly dismiss the Imp before things escalate.
You talk to the Imp and convince it to leave on its own, avoiding any trouble.
You decide to watch the chaos unfold and Quentillius manages to dispel the Imp himself—grumbling about your inaction.

encounters.description: You find yourself in the middle of a water balloon fight between students, some of whom are using magic to enhance the effect of their balloons.

choices.effect: You dodge the water balloons skillfully, impressing the onlookers, including Tasha.
You stealthily refill a balloon with water and launch it at an unsuspecting student.
You decide to sit out, but Tasha offers you a balloon as a peace offering.

encounters.description: While walking the grounds, you encounter a pair of *Giant Rats* causing trouble near a food cart. The owner is asking for help.

choices.effect: You tame the Giant Rats, getting them to leave without causing more problems.
You push the rats away with a swift shove, saving the food cart but getting a little dirty in the process.
You just watch the scene unfold and Quentillius shooes the rats away using magic.
